matches.match_rationale: Mismatches between HR status and payroll ledger only surface after payroll is processed. Anomaly detection flags deviations before they propagate.
matches.opportunity_sketch: A pre-payroll-run anomaly scanner that flags records where HR status and payroll status diverge.

matches.match_rationale: The reconciliation workflow is a classic multi-step business workflow with multi-system orchestration.
matches.opportunity_sketch: An agent that runs on a pre-payroll schedule, pulls HR change events, maps them against the payroll ledger, and flags unreconciled records.

matches.match_rationale: HR and payroll systems use different schemas and identifiers requiring manual mapping.
matches.opportunity_sketch: A transformation layer continuously mapping HR master data exports to the payroll system schema.

matches.match_rationale: Generating exception notifications and reconciliation summary reports reduces the documentation burden.
matches.opportunity_sketch: Auto-generated exception memos and reconciliation summary reports for each payroll cycle.
